chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D- 4883 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For hearing of Main Case. 13.08.2025. Mr. Muhammad Ishaq, Assistant Attorney General. ________________ None present for the petitioner. Even on the last date of hearing he has filed to appear. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non- prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
